properties.comment: Reenacting DML operations only with provenance tracking test cases
properties.entry: REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (UPDATE R SET A = A + 2;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (UPDATE R SET A = A + 2; UPDATE R SET B = 4 WHERE A < 10;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (UPDATE R SET A = A + 2; UPDATE R SET B = 4 WHERE A < 10; DELETE FROM R WHERE A = 3;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R););
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (INSERT INTO R (SELECT sum(a), 1 FROM R););
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE ONLY UPDATED (UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE ONLY UPDATED SHOW INTERMEDIATE (UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS (UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS ONLY UPDATED (UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS SHOW INTERMEDIATE ONLY UPDATED (UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R WHERE B = 2); INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R WHERE B = 2););

A | B | PROV_R_A | PROV_R_B | PROV_R_1_A | PROV_R_1_B | PROV_R_2_A | PROV_R_2_B | PROV_R_3_A | PROV_R_3_B | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 2 | 1 | 2 | 1 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 2 | 3 | 2 | 3 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 |
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS (INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R WHERE B = 2); INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R WHERE B = 2););

A | B | PROV_R_A | PROV_R_B | PROV_R_1_A | PROV_R_1_B | PROV_U1_ins | PROV_R_2_A | PROV_R_2_B | PROV_R_3_A | PROV_R_3_B | PROV_U1_1_ins | PROV_U2_ins | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | f | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | f | 1 | 2 | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | f | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | f | 2 | 1 | 2 | 1 | NULL | NULL | f | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | f | 2 | 3 | 2 | 3 | NULL | NULL | f | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | f | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | t | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | f | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | f | t | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | t | t |

a | b | prov_r_a | prov_r_b | prov_r_1_a | prov_r_1_b | prov_u1_ins | prov_r_2_a | prov_r_2_b | prov_r_3_a | prov_r_3_b | prov_u1_1_ins | prov_u2_ins | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | false | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 2 | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | false | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | false | 2 | 1 | 2 | 1 | NULL | NULL | false | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | false | 2 | 3 | 2 | 3 | NULL | NULL | false | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | true | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | false | true | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | true | true |
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS (INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R WHERE B = 2););

a | b | prov_r_a | prov_r_b | prov_r_1_a | prov_r_1_b | prov_u1_ins | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 2 | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | false | 2 | 1 | 2 | 1 | NULL | NULL | false | 2 | 3 | 2 | 3 | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | true |
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,1); UPDATE R SET A = 100 WHERE B = 2;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,2); UPDATE R SET A = 100 WHERE B = 2; INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,2); UPDATE R SET A = 100 WHERE B = 2;);

A | B | PROV_R_A | PROV_R_B | PROV_query_A | PROV_query_B | PROV_query_1_A | PROV_query_1_B | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 100 | 2 | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 2 | 1 | 2 | 1 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 2 | 3 | 2 | 3 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 100 | 2 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | 100 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 |
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS (INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,1); UPDATE R SET A = 100 WHERE B = 2;);

a | b | prov_r_a | prov_r_b | prov_query_a | prov_query_b | prov_u1_ins | prov_u2_up | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | false | false | 100 | 2 | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | false | true | 2 | 1 | 2 | 1 | NULL | NULL | false | false | 2 | 3 | 2 | 3 | NULL | NULL | false | false | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 1 | true | false |
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE ONLY UPDATED SHOW INTERMEDIATE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS ( UPDATE R SET A = 39;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS ONLY UPDATED (INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,1); UPDATE R SET A = 100 WHERE B = 2;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE ONLY UPDATED SHOW INTERMEDIATE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS ( UPDATE R SET A = 39; INSERT INTO R VALUES (50,50); );
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS ONLY UPDATED (INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,1); INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,2); );
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS (INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,1); INSERT INTO R VALUES (1,2); );

a | b | prov_r_a | prov_r_b | prov_query_a | prov_query_b | prov_u1_ins | prov_query_1_a | prov_query_1_b | prov_u2_ins | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | f | NULL | NULL | f | 1 | 2 | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | f | NULL | NULL | f | 2 | 1 | 2 | 1 | NULL | NULL | f | NULL | NULL | f | 2 | 3 | 2 | 3 | NULL | NULL | f | NULL | NULL | f | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 1 | t | NULL | NULL | f | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | t |

a | b | prov_r_a | prov_r_b | prov_query_a | prov_query_b | prov_u1_ins | prov_query_1_a | prov_query_1_b | prov_u2_ins | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | false | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 2 | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | false | NULL | NULL | false | 2 | 1 | 2 | 1 | NULL | NULL | false | NULL | NULL | false | 2 | 3 | 2 | 3 | NULL | NULL | false | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 1 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 1 | true | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | true |
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE ONLY UPDATED (INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R WHERE B = 2); );
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE ONLY UPDATED (INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R WHERE B = 2); INSERT INTO R (SELECT * FROM R WHERE B = 2); );

a | b | prov_r_a | prov_r_b | prov_r_1_a | prov_r_1_b | prov_u1_ins | prov_r_2_a | prov_r_2_b | prov_r_3_a | prov_r_3_b | prov_u1_1_ins | prov_u2_ins | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | true | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | false | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | false | true | 1 | 2 | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | 1 | 2 | true | true |
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE TABLE R ONLY UPDATED (UPDATE R SET A = 3 WHERE B =1; UPDATE S SET C = 3 WHERE D = 2;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE TABLE S ONLY UPDATED (UPDATE R SET A = 3 WHERE B =1; UPDATE S SET C = 3 WHERE D = 2;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE TABLE R ONLY UPDATED STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS SHOW INTERMEDIATE (UPDATE R SET A = 3 WHERE B =1; UPDATE S SET C = 3 WHERE D = 2;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (OPTIONS (NO PROVENANCE) UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS SHOW INTERMEDIATE ONLY UPDATED (OPTIONS (NO PROVENANCE) UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3;);
REENACT WITH PROVENANCE (OPTIONS (NO PROVENANCE) UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; OPTIONS (NO PROVENANCE) UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3; UPDATE R SET B = 100 WHERE A = 4; );

REENACT WITH PROVENANCE STATEMENT ANNOTATIONS SHOW INTERMEDIATE ONLY UPDATED (OPTIONS (NO PROVENANCE) UPDATE R SET A = A + 2 WHERE B = 2; OPTIONS (NO PROVENANCE) UPDATE R SET A = 4 WHERE B = 3; UPDATE R SET B = 100 WHERE A = 4; );
